nasb.text: I will multiply men on you, all the house of Israel, all of it; and the cities will be inhabited and the waste places will be rebuilt.

esv.text: And I will multiply people on you, the whole house of Israel, all of it. The cities shall be inhabited and the waste places rebuilt.

cnv.text: 我要使以色列全家的人數在你們上面增多；城市有人居住，廢墟可以重建。

ccb.text: 我要增加居住在你们那里的以色列人，使城邑有人居住，废墟得以重建。
